title: Gymnadenia affinis
taxonomy: Gymnadenia affinis is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. This genus is further divided into the subtribe Orchidinae. The species Gymnadenia affinis is native to Europe and Asia. It is often found in woodland habitats and is known for its delicate white or yellowish flowers.

This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, with reported health benefits including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which may contribute to its potential in reducing stress and improving overall well-being.
